violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Food items in walk-in cooler tested at 46*F. Needs to be turned down enough to hold food at 41*F or less.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Floor of walk-in cooler was sealed at some point. Wear and tear is showing through with areas of wood that is not easily cleanable. The floor needs to be treated and sealed.
